task:
Implement the following plan:

# Plan: Support Cursor CLI Hook Differences

## Context

The Cursor agent implementation was built from Cursor IDE hook samples. We now have real hook data from **Cursor CLI** and need to update the implementation to support both. The critical issue is that Cursor CLI never provides `transcript_path`, which breaks the turn-end handler.

**Source data**: IDE log (`simple-session-ide.log`), CLI log (`simple-session-agent-cli.log`), CLI transcript (`agent-transcripts/723fa68d-....jsonl`)

## Corrected Differences (IDE vs CLI)

Comparing both logs reveals the actual differences:

| Hook | IDE `transcript_path` | CLI `transcript_path` |
|------|----------------------|----------------------|
| sessionStart | `null` | `null` |
| beforeSubmitPrompt | `null` | `null` |
| **stop** | **nested path provided** | **`null`** |
| **sessionEnd** | **nested path provided** | **`null`** |

| Aspect | Cursor IDE | Cursor CLI |
|--------|-----------|------------|
| Transcript location | `agent-transcripts/<id>/<id>.jsonl` (nested dir) | `agent-transcripts/<id>.jsonl` (flat file) |
| `transcript_path` on stop/sessionEnd | Provided | `null` |
| `cursor_version` format | Semver (`2.5.17`) | Date-based (`2026.02.13-41ac335`) |
| `composer_mode` on sessionStart | Present (`"agent"`) | Absent |
| `model` on sessionStart | `"default"` | Actual model name |
| `sessionEnd` richer fields | Present (both have `reason`, `duration_ms`, etc.) | Present |
| `stop` extra fields | Present (both have `status`, `loop_count`) | Present |

**Key insight**: `sessionEnd` richer fields (`reason`, `duration_ms`, `is_background_agent`, `final_status`) and `stop` extra fields (`status`, `loop_count`) exist in **both** IDE and CLI — they were always there, just not captured by our types.

## Critical Issue

CLI `stop` hook has `transcript_path: null`, so `SessionRef` is empty on TurnEnd. The lifecycle dispatcher (`lifecycle.go:161-163`) errors:
